prompt: A Japanese Edo-period woodblock print in the precise style of Utagawa Hiroshige, circa 1840, from a coastal travel series. Flat completely unmodulated color throughout — every area of clothing, skin, rock, and water is a single flat tone with zero volumetric shading, zero highlights, zero gradients on figures. Bold black keyblock outlines define every element. Visible woodgrain texture throughout the paper surface. Two fishermen stand in shallow coastal water. The fisherman on the left holds an extraordinarily elaborate net — knotted into hundreds of tiny intricate loops and tangles, so complex it has collapsed into a dense useless mass. Caught in the tangled net are pieces of seaweed, small rocks, driftwood, and debris — noise instead of fish — the net has memorized everything except what it was meant to catch. The fisherman on the right holds a simple clean net with wide regular mesh, and it is full of silver fish. Rocky coastline, stylized flat pine trees on the left, Mount Fuji small and triangular in the far background. Flat spatial stacking with three distinct planes — foreground rocks, midground figures, background mountain — no Western perspective, no cast shadows. Diagonal compositional energy. In the upper right corner a rectangular cartouche with a thin black border contains a vertical column of clean Japanese calligraphy title text in authentic Edo woodblock style with a small red publisher seal below it. Negative prompt: blank cartouche, empty cartouche, pseudo-kanji, shading on figures, volumetric lighting, highlights on robes, gradients on skin, 3D rendering, modern colors, neon, realistic lighting, cast shadows, smooth blending, vanishing point perspective, Western perspective
tradition_period: 1603–1868, specifically the coastal scene style of Utagawa Hiroshige, c. 1840
tradition_approach: Flat unmodulated Prussian blue and indigo palette, bold black keyblock outlines, visible woodgrain texture, three-plane flat spatial stacking, diagonal compositional force, no Western perspective or cast shadows.
